rationale: This is licensed Dragon Ball Z anime IP — using it for Paper.io 2 is a hard non-starter due to copyright/trademark exposure, regardless of creative performance. Beyond the IP issue, a charged-energy anime punch has zero mechanical link to drawing trails and capturing territory, and the dark indigo/purple palette clashes with Paper.io's bright minimalist look (only the gold overlaps). Skip this archetype; if the underlying signal is "satisfying power-release moment," test a safe analog like a massive territory-sweep finisher with a gold-burst payoff instead.
